_description: Azure Monitor alert rule definitions – migrated from AWS CloudWatch Alarms. Deploy via 01_setup_azure_monitoring.ps1 or the ARM template.

alert_rules.name: alert-pipeline-ingest-errors
alert_rules.description: Fires when any ERROR is logged during the ingest stage. Equivalent to AWS CloudWatch alarm 'PipelineIngestErrors'.
alert_rules.query: PipelineEvents_CL | where Stage == 'ingest' and Status == 'ERROR' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-transform-errors
alert_rules.description: Fires when any ERROR is logged during the transform stage.
alert_rules.query: PipelineEvents_CL | where Stage == 'transform' and Status == 'ERROR' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-quality-check-failures
alert_rules.description: Fires when one or more [FAIL] quality checks are recorded. Equivalent to AWS CloudWatch alarm 'DataQualityFailures'.

alert_rules.name: alert-pipeline-stale
alert_rules.description: Fires when no successful ingest run is recorded within 24 hours. Equivalent to AWS CloudWatch alarm 'PipelineStale' with treat_missing_data=breaching.
alert_rules.query: PipelineEvents_CL | where Stage == 'ingest' and Status == 'SUCCESS' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-high-quality-failure-rate
alert_rules.display_name: High Quality Failure Rate (>3 failures in 1 h)
alert_rules.description: Fires when quality checks produce more than 3 failures within a 1-hour window – possible systemic data issue.
alert_rules.query: QualityCheckResults_CL | where Result == 'FAIL' | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | count

alert_rules.name: alert-long-running-pipeline
alert_rules.description: Fires when any pipeline stage takes longer than 600 seconds – indicates a performance regression.
